title: I will be attending Capital Graphics 2026
Began teaching as a Graduate TA
body: Leading lab sessions and holding weekly office hours for undergraduate computer science courses at GMU.

title: Started PhD at George Mason University
body: Joined George Mason's Computer Science PhD program and the Computational Reality, Creativity and Graphics Lab (CraGL) to research animation and non-photorealistic rendering.

title: Finished AmeriCorps NCCC — Forest Corps
body: Wrapped up a year of national service with the US Forest Service — 1,600+ hours reducing wildfire risk across the Western US. Came home a certified Type 2 Firefighter and Type A Sawyer.
